_doc: Stage 04 cumulative discovery output contract. After the rework this document spans Query Journey, Search Results, and SERP Triage because those contracts are now carried through one searchDiscovery() flow. Updated 2026-03-18.

phase_1_adapter_output.queryRows: Array<RowObject> with query, source, target_fields, domain_hint, doc_hint, hint_source, family, group_key, and query_hash

phase_2_guard_output.rows: query rows that passed identity guard
phase_2_guard_output.rejectLog: Array<{ query, source, reason, stage:'pre_execution_guard', detail }>

phase_3_execution_output.rawResults: provider rows from internal corpus, frontier cache reuse, internet providers, or plan-only fallback
phase_3_execution_output.searchAttempts: Array<{ query, provider, result_count, reason_code, duration_ms? }>
phase_3_execution_output.searchJournal: Array<{ ts, query, provider, action?, reason?, result_count, duration_ms? }>

candidate_shape.llm_rerank_score: optional rerank score when the LLM runs

searchProfileFinal.serp_explorer: lane-aware triage explorer with audit trail

discoverCandidateSources_return.uber_search_plan: fallback query planner output when generated
